content_body:
This house is located on a slope just above the Toccoa River, which is a magical location. You can see and hear the soothing sound of the river from all the porches, so it casts a sort of spell on you that made it hard to leave. One day we went out into the river, which was very shallow in the morning, and enjoyed its cool water. It was a blast and made my Father's Day special.

The house itself is large and immaculate. There was enough room for everyone. All amenities were present as expected, and the quality of kitchen items was very high, which made cooking more pleasurable. Blue Ridge was charming and not too far so we spend a half day there. The Blue Ridge railway came by a little before noon going one way and after 1pm going the other way, which was a fun highlight. It's not loud and is the only train on the tracks so it is a positive to the stay.
title: Cast A Spell On You
